text:
Add pyright, ruff formatting.
-- Set leader key
vim.g.mapleader = " "
vim.g.maplocalleader = " "
vim.opt.scrolloff = 3

-- Basic settings
vim.o.hlsearch = false
vim.wo.number = true
vim.o.tabstop = 2
vim.o.expandtab = true
vim.o.softtabstop = 2
vim.o.shiftwidth = 2
vim.o.mouse = "a"
vim.o.clipboard = "unnamedplus"
vim.o.breakindent = true
vim.o.undofile = true
vim.o.ignorecase = true
vim.o.smartcase = true
vim.wo.signcolumn = "yes"
vim.o.updatetime = 250
vim.o.timeoutlen = 300
vim.o.completeopt = "menuone,noselect"
vim.o.termguicolors = true

-- Filetype detection for .templ files
vim.cmd("au BufRead,BufNewFile *.templ setfiletype templ")

-- Add Mason bin to path
local is_windows = vim.loop.os_uname().sysname == "Windows_NT"
vim.env.PATH = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/mason/bin" .. (is_windows and ";" or ":") .. vim.env.PATH

-- Install mini.nvim if not installed
local mini_path = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/mini/start/mini.nvim"
if not vim.loop.fs_stat(mini_path) then
  vim.fn.system({
    "git",
    "clone",
    "https://github.com/echasnovski/mini.nvim",
    mini_path,
  })
end

-- Load mini.nvim
vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")

-- Setup mini modules
-- Load and configure mini.nvim modules
local MiniDeps = require("mini.deps")

MiniDeps.setup({ path = { package = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/deps" } })

MiniDeps.add({
  source = "echasnovski/mini.nvim",
  depends = {},
  hooks = {
    post_checkout = function()
      vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")
    end,
  },
})

-- Load modules after mini.nvim is ensured
require("mini.basics").setup({
  options = {
    basic = true,
    extra_ui = true,
    win_borders = "single",
  },
  mappings = {
    basic = true,
    option_toggle_prefix = [[\]],
    windows = true,
    move_with_alt = true,
  },
})

require("mini.pairs").setup()
require("mini.comment").setup()
require("mini.ai").setup()
require("mini.indentscope").setup({
  symbol = "│",
  options = { try_as_border = true },
})

require("mini.files").setup()

-- Optional: statusline
require("mini.statusline").setup()

-- Optional: Starter (dashboard)
require("mini.starter").setup()

-- Optional: Surround
require("mini.surround").setup()

-- Optional: Bracketed motions (like [b ]b)
require("mini.bracketed").setup()

-- Telescope and dependencies
MiniDeps.add({ source = "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" }) -- Required by Telescope
MiniDeps.add({
  source = "nvim-telescope/telescope.nvim",
  depends = { "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" },
})

-- 🧠 Lazy-load Telescope on keymap
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>ff", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").find_files()
end, { desc = "Find Files" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fg", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").live_grep()
end, { desc = "Live Grep" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fb", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").buffers()
end, { desc = "List Buffers" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fh", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").help_tags()
end, { desc = "Help Tags" })

-- Optional: configure Telescope only when it loads
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("User", {
  pattern = "VeryLazy", -- or use first telescope keybinding event
  callback = function()
    require("telescope").setup({
      defaults = {
        layout_config = { prompt_position = "top" },
        sorting_strategy = "ascending",
        winblend = 10,
      },
    })
  end,
})

-- LSP + Autocomplete + Formatting setup

-- Mason + lspconfig + mason-lspconfig
MiniDeps.add({ source = "neovim/nvim-lspconfig" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "williamboman/mason.nvim" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "williamboman/mason-lspconfig.nvim" })

-- nvim-cmp and friends
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/nvim-cmp" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-nvim-lsp" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-buffer" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-path" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-cmdline" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "L3MON4D3/LuaSnip" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "saadparwaiz1/cmp_luasnip" })

-- Conform for formatting
MiniDeps.add({ source = "stevearc/conform.nvim" })

-- Optional: Trouble for diagnostics UI
MiniDeps.add({ source = "folke/trouble.nvim" })

-- === Configuration Autocommand ===
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("User", {
  pattern = "VeryLazy", -- Can replace with event you prefer
  callback = function()
    -- Mason
    require("mason").setup()
    require("mason-lspconfig").setup({
      ensure_installed = { "lua_ls", "tsserver", "html", "jsonls" }, -- Customize
      automatic_installation = true,
    })

    -- LSP setup
    local lspconfig = require("lspconfig")
    local capabilities = require("cmp_nvim_lsp").default_capabilities()

    local servers = { "lua_ls", "tsserver", "html", "jsonls" }
    for _, server in ipairs(servers) do
      lspconfig[server].setup({
        capabilities = capabilities,
      })
    end

    -- nvim-cmp config
    local cmp = require("cmp")
    local luasnip = require("luasnip")
    cmp.setup({
      snippet = {
        expand = function(args)
          luasnip.lsp_expand(args.body)
        end,
      },
      mapping = cmp.mapping.preset.insert({
        ["<C-Space>"] = cmp.mapping.complete(),
        ["<CR>"] = cmp.mapping.confirm({ select = true }),
        ["<Tab>"] = cmp.mapping(function(fallback)
          if cmp.visible() then
            cmp.select_next_item()
          elseif luasnip.expand_or_jumpable() then
            luasnip.expand_or_jump()
          else
            fallback()
          end
        end, { "i", "s" }),
      }),
      sources = {
        { name = "nvim_lsp" },
        { name = "luasnip" },
        { name = "buffer" },
        { name = "path" },
      },
    })

    -- Formatting (Conform)
    require("conform").setup({
      format_on_save = {
        timeout_ms = 500,
        lsp_fallback = true,
      },
      formatters_by_ft = {
        lua = { "stylua" },
        javascript = { "prettier" },
        typescript = { "prettier" },
        json = { "prettier" },
      },
    })

    -- Trouble (optional)
    require("trouble").setup({})
    vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>xx", "<cmd>TroubleToggle<cr>", { desc = "Toggle Trouble" })
  end,
})

-- LSP mappings
vim.keymap.set("n", "gd", vim.lsp.buf.definition, { desc = "Go to definition" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "K", vim.lsp.buf.hover, { desc = "Hover doc" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>rn", vim.lsp.buf.rename, { desc = "Rename symbol" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>ca", vim.lsp.buf.code_action, { desc = "Code action" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "gr", vim.lsp.buf.references, { desc = "References" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>f", function()
  require("conform").format({ async = true })
end, { desc = "Format buffer" })

I'll add pyright and ruff configuration to your Neovim setup. Here's the updated configuration:

```lua
-- Set leader key
vim.g.mapleader = " "
vim.g.maplocalleader = " "
vim.opt.scrolloff = 3

-- Basic settings
vim.o.hlsearch = false
vim.wo.number = true
vim.o.tabstop = 2
vim.o.expandtab = true
vim.o.softtabstop = 2
vim.o.shiftwidth = 2
vim.o.mouse = "a"
vim.o.clipboard = "unnamedplus"
vim.o.breakindent = true
vim.o.undofile = true
vim.o.ignorecase = true
vim.o.smartcase = true
vim.wo.signcolumn = "yes"
vim.o.updatetime = 250
vim.o.timeoutlen = 300
vim.o.completeopt = "menuone,noselect"
vim.o.termguicolors = true

-- Filetype detection for .templ files
vim.cmd("au BufRead,BufNewFile *.templ setfiletype templ")

-- Add Mason bin to path
local is_windows = vim.loop.os_uname().sysname == "Windows_NT"
vim.env.PATH = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/mason/bin" .. (is_windows and ";" or ":") .. vim.env.PATH

-- Install mini.nvim if not installed
local mini_path = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/mini/start/mini.nvim"
if not vim.loop.fs_stat(mini_path) then
  vim.fn.system({
    "git",
    "clone",
    "https://github.com/echasnovski/mini.nvim",
    mini_path,
  })
end

-- Load mini.nvim
vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")

-- Setup mini modules
-- Load and configure mini.nvim modules
local MiniDeps = require("mini.deps")

MiniDeps.setup({ path = { package = vim.fn.stdpath("data") .. "/site/pack/deps" } })

MiniDeps.add({
  source = "echasnovski/mini.nvim",
  depends = {},
  hooks = {
    post_checkout = function()
      vim.cmd("packadd mini.nvim")
    end,
  },
})

-- Load modules after mini.nvim is ensured
require("mini.basics").setup({
  options = {
    basic = true,
    extra_ui = true,
    win_borders = "single",
  },
  mappings = {
    basic = true,
    option_toggle_prefix = [[\]],
    windows = true,
    move_with_alt = true,
  },
})

require("mini.pairs").setup()
require("mini.comment").setup()
require("mini.ai").setup()
require("mini.indentscope").setup({
  symbol = "│",
  options = { try_as_border = true },
})

require("mini.files").setup()

-- Optional: statusline
require("mini.statusline").setup()

-- Optional: Starter (dashboard)
require("mini.starter").setup()

-- Optional: Surround
require("mini.surround").setup()

-- Optional: Bracketed motions (like [b ]b)
require("mini.bracketed").setup()

-- Telescope and dependencies
MiniDeps.add({ source = "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" }) -- Required by Telescope
MiniDeps.add({
  source = "nvim-telescope/telescope.nvim",
  depends = { "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" },
})

-- 🧠 Lazy-load Telescope on keymap
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>ff", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").find_files()
end, { desc = "Find Files" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fg", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").live_grep()
end, { desc = "Live Grep" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fb", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").buffers()
end, { desc = "List Buffers" })

vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>fh", function()
  require("telescope.builtin").help_tags()
end, { desc = "Help Tags" })

-- Optional: configure Telescope only when it loads
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("User", {
  pattern = "VeryLazy", -- or use first telescope keybinding event
  callback = function()
    require("telescope").setup({
      defaults = {
        layout_config = { prompt_position = "top" },
        sorting_strategy = "ascending",
        winblend = 10,
      },
    })
  end,
})

-- LSP + Autocomplete + Formatting setup

-- Mason + lspconfig + mason-lspconfig
MiniDeps.add({ source = "neovim/nvim-lspconfig" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "williamboman/mason.nvim" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "williamboman/mason-lspconfig.nvim" })

-- nvim-cmp and friends
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/nvim-cmp" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-nvim-lsp" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-buffer" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-path" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "hrsh7th/cmp-cmdline" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "L3MON4D3/LuaSnip" })
MiniDeps.add({ source = "saadparwaiz1/cmp_luasnip" })

-- Conform for formatting
MiniDeps.add({ source = "stevearc/conform.nvim" })

-- Optional: Trouble for diagnostics UI
MiniDeps.add({ source = "folke/trouble.nvim" })

-- === Configuration Autocommand ===
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("User", {
  pattern = "VeryLazy", -- Can replace with event you prefer
  callback = function()
    -- Mason
    require("mason").setup()
    require("mason-lspconfig").setup({
      ensure_installed = { 
        "lua_ls", 
        "tsserver", 
        "html", 
        "jsonls",
        "pyright", -- Added pyright
      },
      automatic_installation = true,
    })

    -- LSP setup
    local lspconfig = require("lspconfig")
    local capabilities = require("cmp_nvim_lsp").default_capabilities()

    local servers = { "lua_ls", "tsserver", "html", "jsonls", "pyright" }
    
    -- Pyright specific configuration
    lspconfig.pyright.setup({
      capabilities = capabilities,
      settings = {
        python = {
          analysis = {
            autoSearchPaths = true,
            diagnosticMode = "workspace",
            useLibraryCodeForTypes = true,
            typeCheckingMode = "basic", -- Can be "off", "basic", or "strict"
          },
        },
      },
    })
    
    -- Setup other servers
    for _, server in ipairs(servers) do
      if server ~= "pyright" then -- Skip pyright as we configured it separately
        lspconfig[server].setup({
          capabilities = capabilities,
        })
      end
    end

    -- nvim-cmp config
    local cmp = require("cmp")
    local luasnip = require("luasnip")
    cmp.setup({
      snippet = {
        expand = function(args)
          luasnip.lsp_expand(args.body)
        end,
      },
      mapping = cmp.mapping.preset.insert({
        ["<C-Space>"] = cmp.mapping.complete(),
        ["<CR>"] = cmp.mapping.confirm({ select = true }),
        ["<Tab>"] = cmp.mapping(function(fallback)
          if cmp.visible() then
            cmp.select_next_item()
          elseif luasnip.expand_or_jumpable() then
            luasnip.expand_or_jump()
          else
            fallback()
          end
        end, { "i", "s" }),
      }),
      sources = {
        { name = "nvim_lsp" },
        { name = "luasnip" },
        { name = "buffer" },
        { name = "path" },
      },
    })

    -- Formatting (Conform)
    require("conform").setup({
      format_on_save = {
        timeout_ms = 500,
        lsp_fallback = true,
      },
      formatters_by_ft = {
        lua = { "stylua" },
        javascript = { "prettier" },
        typescript = { "prettier" },
        json = { "prettier" },
        python = { "ruff_format", "ruff_fix" }, -- Added ruff for Python formatting
      },
    })

    -- Ensure formatters are installed
    local ensure_formatters = { "stylua", "prettier", "ruff" }
    require("mason.api.command").MasonInstall(ensure_formatters)

    -- Trouble (optional)
    require("trouble").setup({})
    vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>xx", "<cmd>TroubleToggle<cr>", { desc = "Toggle Trouble" })
  end,
})

-- LSP mappings
vim.keymap.set("n", "gd", vim.lsp.buf.definition, { desc = "Go to definition" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "K", vim.lsp.buf.hover, { desc = "Hover doc" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>rn", vim.lsp.buf.rename, { desc = "Rename symbol" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>ca", vim.lsp.buf.code_action, { desc = "Code action" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "gr", vim.lsp.buf.references, { desc = "References" })
vim.keymap.set("n", "<leader>f", function()
  require("conform").format({ async = true })
end, { desc = "Format buffer" })
```

### Changes made:

1. **Added Pyright to LSP setup**:
   - Added pyright to `ensure_installed` list in mason-lspconfig
   - Added specific configuration for pyright with type checking settings

2. **Added Ruff for Python formatting**:
   - Configured `conform.nvim` to use ruff_format and ruff_fix for Python files
   - Ruff is a fast Python linter and formatter that combines the functionality of many other tools

3. **Added automatic installation of formatters**:
   - Added a call to ensure the formatters (including ruff) are installed via Mason

With these changes, you'll have:
- Pyright for Python type checking and language server functionality
- Ruff for Python formatting and linting
- Integrated them with your existing LSP and formatting setup

You can customize the pyright settings or ruff configuration further based on your specific needs.
